name: NATA 2025 or 2026 Score Card
format_notes: Original score card. Mark list submitted by other means or after the deadline is not considered for rank list preparation.

name: 10+2 (HSE) or equivalent mark list
format_notes: Provisional or original mark list with subject-wise marks. Required to compute the qualifying-exam component of the rank.

name: SSLC or equivalent (Class 10) certificate
format_notes: Used as proof of date of birth and educational baseline.

name: Date of birth proof
format_notes: SSLC or birth certificate. Must show that the candidate is 17 years or older on 31 December 2026.

name: Nativity certificate
required_for: Candidates claiming Keralite or Non-Keralite I / II category
format_notes: Must be in the proforma prescribed by the Government of Kerala. Issued by the Village Officer or competent revenue authority.

name: Community / caste certificate
required_for: Candidates claiming SC, ST, SEBC, or OEC reservation
format_notes: Issued by the Tahsildar or designated authority. Required for reservation claims and fee concessions.

name: Non-Creamy Layer certificate
format_notes: Required to claim SEBC reservation and SEBC-linked fee exemption (annual income up to Rs. 6 lakhs).

name: Income certificate
required_for: Candidates claiming fee concession or Tuition Fee Waiver
format_notes: In the prescribed proforma. Annual income limits: Rs. 6 lakhs for SEBC fee exemption, Rs. 8 lakhs for the Tuition Fee Waiver scheme.

name: Disability certificate / UDID card
required_for: Candidates claiming PD (Persons with Disabilities) reservation
format_notes: Minimum 40% benchmark disability is generally required. UDID card is the preferred proof.
certificate_authority: Notified medical authority under the Persons with Disabilities Act 2016

name: Inter-caste marriage certificate
required_for: Candidates claiming benefit of inter-caste marriage
format_notes: Issued by the appropriate revenue or social-welfare authority.

name: Sports / NCC proficiency certificate
required_for: Candidates claiming Sports or NCC quota for B.Arch
format_notes: For B.Arch, sports and NCC marks (out of 500 each) are added to the architecture index, taking the maximum to 1000. Submit certificates as per the proforma in the prospectus.

name: Photograph and signature (digital)
format_notes: JPEG/JPG only. 150x100 pixels, file size 1 to 100 KB. Required during the online application step.
